title: Remove default column in a table
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
On one of my boards, I have a form whose answers arrive in a table. Each field in the form has its own related column in the table. However, the first column of my table contains a value that I can only …

posts.author: Zacharie_Bouhadana (Bouhadana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

On one of my boards, I have a form whose answers arrive in a table. Each field in the form has its own related column in the table. However, the first column of my table contains a value that I can only change in Settings > Change item terminology.
Do you know if there is a way to remove this column, or atleast, to hide it (through filters or something else) ?

Thank you in advance !

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Am I understanding the reason you want to hide this column is because this first column is not being utilized as a question on your form? Currently, it’s not possible to hide the first column because it contains the speech bubble icon, which is essential for navigating to the item’s updates section.
